Filesystem.comment: Provides read/write access to files and directories within the workspace folder.

Sequential Thinking.comment: Sequential Thinking is a tool that allows the agent to think sequentially and reason about the problem step by step.

Context7.comment: Fetches up-to-date documentation for libraries, frameworks, and APIs to supplement training data.

Context Mode.comment: Context window protection plugin — indexes output and processes data in a sandbox to prevent context overflow.

Server Memory.comment: Persistent knowledge graph memory for storing and recalling information across sessions.

Git.comment: Git operations — status, diff, log, commit, branch management, and repository introspection.

GitHub.comment: GitHub API integration — manage issues, pull requests, repositories, and code search.

Serena.comment: Semantic code intelligence — symbol navigation, search, refactoring, and codebase exploration.

semgrep.comment: Static code analysis for security vulnerabilities, bugs, and code quality issues.

Figma.comment: Access Figma designs — layouts, components, styles, and design tokens for code implementation.

Pencil.name: Pencil
Pencil.comment: Design tool for creating and editing .pen design files — layout, components, and visual prototyping.

Chrome DevTools.comment: Browser debugging — inspect DOM, network requests, console, performance, and accessibility audits.

WebMCP.comment: Web interaction tool — browse websites, extract content, and interact with web pages.

Playwright.comment: Browser automation — navigate, click, fill forms, screenshots, and end-to-end testing.

Apollo MCP.comment: Connects to a local Apollo GraphQL server for schema introspection and query execution.

Sentry.comment: Error and performance monitoring — view issues, traces, and release health from Sentry.

supabase.comment: Supabase backend management — database, auth, storage, and edge functions.

postgres.comment: Direct PostgreSQL database access — query, schema inspection, and database management.

Docker.comment: Docker container management — build, run, stop, list containers and images.

Podman.comment: Podman container management — daemonless alternative to Docker for containers and pods.

k8s.comment: Kubernetes cluster management — pods, deployments, services, logs, and resource inspection.

Postman.comment: Postman API platform — manage collections, environments, and test APIs.

Postman Code.comment: Postman code generation — convert API requests into client code in various languages.

Postman Minimal.comment: Lightweight Postman client — basic API request execution without full platform features.

API specification.comment: Apidog API spec access — browse and query OpenAPI/Swagger specifications.

Trivy.comment: Security scanner for containers, Kubernetes, and IaC — detects vulnerabilities and misconfigurations.

ClickHouse.comment: ClickHouse OLAP database — run analytical SQL queries against columnar data.

Tavily.comment: AI-optimized web search — deep search with image support for research and information gathering.

Exa.comment: Exa AI search engine — high-quality web search and content extraction for research.

AWS Core.comment: AWS core services — S3, Lambda, SQS, SNS, DynamoDB, and general AWS API access.

Azure.comment: Microsoft Azure services — manage resources, subscriptions, and cloud infrastructure.
